g(W)end,function(u)local X,K=267288-267287,u[-668703+668704]while K do l[K],X=l[K]-(1040009-1040008),X+(621328-621327)if l[K]==702960+-702960 then l[K],Z[K]=nil,nil end K=u[X]end end,function(u,X)local g=M(X)local j=function()return K(u,{},X,g)end return j end,function()V=(-406113+406114)+V l[V]=887548+-887547 return V end return(F(6150706-655124,{}))(g(W))end)(getfenv and
